flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Purdue University Global fell 24% between 2021 and 2024 (75.0% → 57.1%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Purdue University Global fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Purdue University Global rose 74% between 2021 and 2024 (28.7% → 50.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Purdue University Global rose 25% between 2021 and 2024 (26.7% → 33.3%).
